welcome: рҹҡҖ WARP Config Generator в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ Generate Cloudflare WARP VPN configs in multiple formats with one tap. рҹ“Ӣ Supported formats: рҹ”җ WireGuard рҹӣЎпёҸ AmneziaWG вҡ”пёҸ Clash / Clash Meta рҹӘҹ WireSock (Windows) рҹ“Ң Commands: /start вҖ” main menu /lang вҖ” change language /cancel вҖ” cancel generation Use the menu below to get started в¬ҮпёҸ
help: вқ“ Help & Guides в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ рҹ“Ң Basic Commands: /start вҖ” show welcome & menu /lang вҖ” change language /cancel вҖ” cancel current generation рҹ“– How to use this bot 1. Tap рҹҡҖ Generate Config 2. Choose a VPN format (WireGuard, AmneziaWG, etc.) 3. Pick a DNS server and endpoint 4. Select routing mode (all traffic or specific sites) 5. Confirm вҖ” the bot will generate and send you a config file рҹ“Ұ VPN Formats рҹ”җ WireGuard вҖ” standard .conf for any WireGuard client рҹӣЎпёҸ AmneziaWG вҖ” WireGuard with DPI bypass (use AmneziaVPN app) вҡ”пёҸ Clash вҖ” YAML proxy config for Clash / Clash Meta рҹӘҹ WireSock вҖ” WireGuard config for Windows (WireSock app) рҹ“І How to import вҖў WireGuard вҖ” open the app вҶ’ Import from file вҖў AmneziaVPN вҖ” use the vpn:// deep link or import .conf вҖў Clash вҖ” paste the YAML into your Clash profile вҖў WireSock вҖ” load the .conf in the WireSock client
warp_status: рҹ“Ҡ WARP Status Check the current Cloudflare WARP service status: рҹ‘ү @cfwarpstatus
step_format: вҡҷпёҸ Step 1/5 вҖ” Choose config format: Select the output format for your VPN configuration.
step_dns: рҹ”© Step 2/5 вҖ” Select DNS server: рҹҢҗ DNS servers marked [C] вҖ” community (may help bypass blocks).
step_relay: рҹ”„ Step 3/5 вҖ” Select endpoint: Default вҖ” standard Cloudflare endpoint. Country servers may help bypass regional blocks.
step_routing: рҹ”— Step 4/5 вҖ” Select routing mode: All traffic вҖ” all traffic through VPN. Specific sites вҖ” only selected services.
step_services: рҹ”— Select services to route through WARP: (tap to toggle, then press Done)
step_confirm: рҹ“Ӣ Confirm config generation в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ рҹ“Ұ Format: {format} рҹҢҗ DNS: {dns} рҹ”„ Endpoint: {relay} рҹ”— Routing: {routing} Press вң… Confirm to generate the config.
generation_failed: вқҢ Failed to register with Cloudflare WARP. Please try again later.
flood_wait: вҸі Too many actions in a short time. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
generation_cooldown_wait: вҸі Please wait {seconds}s before generating again.
amnezia_deeplink: рҹ”— AmneziaVPN Deep Link Open the file and copy the vpn:// link into AmneziaVPN.
web_subtitle: Create a Cloudflare WARP config in a few clicks
web_hint_relay: Alternative endpoints may improve connection speed
web_hint_routing: Full tunnel routes all traffic through VPN. Split routes only selected services
web_error_warp: WARP registration failed. Cloudflare API may be blocked in your region. Try running on a VPS or cloud server.
web_error_rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again in a minute.
